core_mechanism: form-invariance of a governing wave equation under a coordinate/parameter transformation, exploited to redesign the medium's spatially-varying coefficients so that a chosen region is bypassed and made undetectable to the field (transformation-based cloaking)
brief_reason: The abstract proposes an invariant transformation that, by designing the potential and effective mass in the cloaking region, leaves the wave dynamics at a given energy invariant while routing matter waves around a hidden region.
